runs.ratchet_note: Initial ratchet at new standard: min of 2 warm runs (77525.5 / 78615.8 ms); 3rd run at 102154 was a thermal outlier. Core best: 3938.4 ms (run 2). Ratio 19.68x.

standardization_note: New perf-loop standard: sha2-chain --num-iters 16 --log-t 16 (~2^16 cycles). Replaces muldiv log_t=12 standard effective 2026-04-19 per user direction.
